title: felicia dentata subsp. dentata
intro: Felicia dentata subsp. dentata, also known as the Cape daisy or felicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Felicia dentata subsp. dentata include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a poultice or salve, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
